channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: SPLC operates as hedge fund with anti-racism newsletter, critics say
item.description: Staff at SPLC reportedly joked about working 'until justice rolls down like dollars.'

item.title: Carney secures majority, continues Trudeau-era policies
item.description: New Liberal majority in Parliament expected to maintain status quo with minor adjustments.

item.title: Media's credibility questioned after Biden-era coverage, critics say
item.description: Atlantic magazine's anonymous pieces against Trump draw skepticism from conservatives.

item.title: Virginia GOP donors faulted for lack of ground game investment
item.description: Local Republicans say national party failed to spend money on canvassing and voter turnout.

item.title: Hakeem Jeffries challenges Trump to debate over 'low IQ' remark
item.description: House Minority Leader offers to debate president in response to Trump calling him 'low IQ person.'

item.title: Meadows Museum showcases 19th-century Spanish art between Goya and Picasso
item.description: Dallas exhibition highlights Raimundo de Madrazo and Spain's overlooked artistic period.

item.title: California Democrats reject English tests for truckers, calling them 'reckless'
item.description: Leading governor candidates oppose Trump administration reforms on immigrant truck driver testing.

item.title: DHS flags 24,000 potential noncitizens on U.S. voter rolls
item.description: Homeland Security identifies names that may belong to ineligible noncitizen voters, department says.

item.title: Virginia GOP donors underestimated gerrymandering threat until too late
item.description: Republicans say lack of investment in GOTV and canvassing allowed Democratic map manipulation.

item.title: SPLC accused of secretly funding informants in white supremacist groups
item.description: DOJ investigation reportedly reveals Southern Poverty Law Center's use of paid infiltrators.

item.title: Streamer Hasan Piker condemned for disdain toward societal rules
item.description: Left-wing personality repeatedly expressed contempt for foundational social norms, critics say.

item.title: Turkey seen as weak link in Trump's economic pressure on Iran
item.description: Nation's regulatory environment remains key conduit for Tehran despite US sanctions.

item.title: Liberal justices used footnote to delay Dobbs release after leak, Alito said
item.description: Justice Alito warned colleagues that delaying opinion amid assassination threats was dangerous.

item.title: Strokes frontman compares American Zionists to slave-era Black people
item.description: Julian Casablancas says 'privileged' Zionists talk like oppressors, sparking controversy.

item.title: Inspector general to probe DOJ's handling of Epstein files
item.description: Justice Department watchdog launches investigation into release of documents related to Jeffrey Epstein.
